name: NRC HEALTH
business: NRC Health provides subscription-based healthcare experience management solutions that capture and analyze feedback from patients, consumers, and employees to help healthcare organizations improve quality and loyalty.

exposures.sentence: Our comprehensive platform includes a next-generation suite of Artificial Intelligence ( AI )-enabled products that create a natural way to collect, analyze, and deliver feedback.

If we or our third-party service providers sustain cyber-attacks or other privacy or data security incidents that result in security breaches that disrupt our operations or result in the unintended dissemination of protected personal information or proprietary or confidential information or AI impacts our demand for, or providing of, services, we could suffer a loss of revenue and increased costs, exposure to significant liability, reputational harm, and other serious negative consequences.

catalysts.event: Increase in quarterly cash dividend from $0.12 to $0.16 per share, effective with the dividend payable in January 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, our Board of Directors increased the quarterly cash dividend payable from 12 cents per share to 16 cents per share commencing with the dividend payable in January 2026.

catalysts.event: Total Recurring Contract Value increased to $152.0 million as of March 4, 2026, an all-time high.
catalysts.sentence: Since December 31, 2025, the Company's TRCV has increased from $144.1 million to $152.0 million at March 4, 2026, representing an all-time high for this metric.
